forWhom.lead: Each profile enters the summit with a clear objective. What unites the space is that everyone comes to take action.

investors.title: Investors
investors.lead: You come to understand, decide and deploy capital.
bullets: Curated access to projects pre-selected by the committee
1:1 deal rooms for direct conversations with managers
Focused networking with family offices, fund managers and HNWIs
Meeting agenda managed by the summit app

managers.title: Professional Managers
managers.lead: You come to learn, connect and expand your network.
bullets: Talks and panels with the region's top allocators
Networking spaces with LPs, family offices and other managers
Visibility as a reference in your asset class
Actionable content to bring back to your clients

founders.title: Founders & Project Leads
founders.lead: You come to present your project and raise capital.
bullets: Premium booth with your brand and project materials
Curated pitch stage on day two of the summit
1:1 meetings with LPs and investors aligned to your vertical
Curation of relevant investors for your round

sponsors.title: Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.lead: You come to position your brand where capital is decided.
bullets: Branding in the venue and across all summit communications
Direct access to qualified investors, managers and founders
Custom activations: lounges, cocktails, kits, content
Co-branding in post-event pieces and summit reports

thesis.lead: We didn't pick a vertical. We built a summit where conversations cross asset classes — because that's where the real opportunities live.

speakers.lead: Active fund managers, family offices, founders in active rounds and operators of the assets defining LatAm.

empty.title: Announcing speakers soon.
empty.lead: We're closing the line-up. To be among the first to know who takes the stage, request your invitation.

sponsors.title: Who's in.
sponsors.emptyLead: We're closing partnerships with the funds and companies moving LATAM capital. If you want to be here, reach out.

faq.title: What people ask before walking in.

footer.tagline: is the space where real capital meets the opportunities moving Latin America. October 2026 · Medellín.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: We'll email you a 6-digit code. No passwords.
login.codeSentBody: We sent a code to {email}. Check it and paste it here.
login.noAccount: If you don't have an account yet, we'll create one automatically.

me.subtitle: My account
me.title: Your access to the summit.
me.profileNote: Your profile is complete once you confirm your role before the summit. For now this data is enough for your access.
